vertexAgent.serverUrl.description: Base URL of your LLM server.

vertexAgent.apiKey.description: API key for Gemini/Claude or compatible providers.

vertexAgent.useAccessToken.description: Whether to use Bearer access token.

vertexAgent.accessToken.description: Bearer access token for OpenAI-compatible APIs.

vertexAgent.temperature.description: Temperature for AI responses (0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = creative).

vertexAgent.judgeEnabled.description: Enable LLM-as-Judge quality gate for complex tasks. The judge reviews proposed edits before they are written to disk.

vertexAgent.judgeProvider.description: Which provider to use as judge. 'same' uses the same provider as the main request. Use 'claude' or 'gemini' for a stronger judge even when coding with a local model.

vertexAgent.judgeApiKey.description: API key for the judge provider (only needed when judgeProvider differs from the main provider).

vertexAgent.judgeMinConfidence.description: Minimum judge confidence (0.0–1.0) required to trigger a retry. Low-confidence verdicts are ignored to avoid false-positive retries.

vertexAgent.multiAgentForOllama.description: Allow the judge and orchestrator to run when the main provider is Ollama. Disabled by default because multiple sequential local LLM calls are slow.

vertexAgent.orchestratorEnabled.description: Enable the Orchestrator for highly complex tasks (score >= 4). The Orchestrator decomposes the task into a Planner → parallel Coders → Judge pipeline.

vertexAgent.plannerProvider.description: Provider for the Planner sub-agent. Use 'claude' or 'gemini' for a stronger planner when the main coder is a local model.

vertexAgent.maxSubAgents.description: Maximum number of parallel Coder sub-agents the Orchestrator may spawn.

vertexAgent.autoWriteTests.description: Automatically generate unit tests when the Orchestrator creates new modules or classes.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:requirements
scripts.test:unit: node tests/unit/diff-logic.test.js && node tests/unit/system-prompt.test.js && node tests/unit/chat-html.test.js && node tests/unit/task-classifier.test.js && node tests/unit/judge-gating.test.js && node tests/unit/bugfix-regression.test.js && node tests/unit/orchestrator-planning.test.js && node tests/unit/orchestrator-routing.test.js
